title: Valid Registration
preconditions: User does not have an existing account
steps: Step 1: Enter a valid email address
Step 2: Enter a valid password meeting the system's requirements
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system displays a success message and sends a verification email

title: Duplicate Email Registration
preconditions: User already has an existing account with the same email
steps: Step 1: Enter an email address that is already in use
Step 2: Enter a valid password
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating the email is already in use

title: Invalid Email Registration
preconditions: User does not have an existing account
steps: Step 1: Enter an invalid email address
Step 2: Enter a valid password
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating the email is invalid

title: Weak Password Registration
preconditions: User does not have an existing account
steps: Step 1: Enter a valid email address
Step 2: Enter a password that does not meet the system's requirements
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating the password is weak

title: Unverified Email Access
preconditions: User has registered but not verified their email
steps: Step 1: Attempt to log in with the unverified email address
Step 2: Enter the correct password
expected_result: The system prevents access and prompts the user to verify their email

title: Empty Email Registration
preconditions: User does not have an existing account
steps: Step 1: Leave the email field empty
Step 2: Enter a valid password
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating the email is required

title: Maximum Length Email Registration
preconditions: User does not have an existing account
steps: Step 1: Enter an email address with the maximum allowed length
Step 2: Enter a valid password
Step 3: Confirm the password
Step 4: Submit the registration form
expected_result: The system allows the registration or displays an error message if the email is too long

title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
steps: Step 1: Enter valid username and password
Step 2: Click the login button
expected_result: The system authenticates the user and redirects to the dashboard

title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
steps: Step 1: Enter invalid username or password
Step 2: Click the login button
expected_result: The system displays an error message

title: Consecutive Failed Login Attempts
steps: Step 1: Enter invalid username or password and click the login button
Step 2: Repeat step 1 multiple times
Step 3: Attempt to login after multiple failed attempts
expected_result: The system temporarily locks the account

title: Two-Factor Authentication
steps: Step 1: Enter valid username and password
Step 2: Receive and enter the two-factor authentication code
expected_result: The system authenticates the user and redirects to the dashboard

title: SQL Injection Attack
steps: Step 1: Enter a username with a SQL injection payload
Step 2: Click the login button
expected_result: The system prevents the SQL injection attack and displays an error message

title: Password Reset Functionality
steps: Step 1: Click the forgot password link
Step 2: Enter the username or email address associated with the account
Step 3: Receive and follow the password reset instructions
expected_result: The system allows the user to reset their password and login successfully

title: Successful Password Reset
preconditions: User has a registered email address
steps: Step 1: User requests a password reset
Step 2: User receives a reset link via email within 5 minutes
Step 3: User clicks the reset link and sets a new password within 30 minutes
expected_result: The system updates the user's password successfully and logs the user in automatically

title: Password Reset with Invalid Email
preconditions: User does not have a valid account
User enters an email address not registered in the system
steps: Step 1: User requests a password reset with an invalid email address
Step 2: System attempts to send a reset link to the email address
expected_result: The system handles the case where the user's email is not found and notifies the user

title: Expired Password Reset Link
preconditions: User has a registered email address
Password reset link has expired (more than 30 minutes old)
steps: Step 1: User attempts to use an expired password reset link
Step 2: System checks the expiration time of the reset link
expected_result: The system notifies the user that the password reset link has expired

title: Locked or Disabled Account Password Reset
preconditions: User's account is locked or disabled
steps: Step 1: User requests a password reset
Step 2: System checks the account status
expected_result: The system handles the case where the user's account is locked or disabled and notifies the user

title: Brute-Force Password Reset Attempt
preconditions: User has a registered email address
steps: Step 1: User attempts to guess the password reset link multiple times
Step 2: System detects and prevents brute-force attempts
expected_result: The system prevents brute-force attempts to guess the password reset link

title: Update Profile with Valid Data
steps: Step 1: User navigates to the profile management page
Step 2: User enters a valid name (less than 50 characters)
Step 3: User enters a valid phone number (10 digits)
Step 4: User clicks the update profile button
expected_result: The system updates the user's profile immediately

title: Update Profile with Invalid Phone Number
steps: Step 1: User navigates to the profile management page
Step 2: User enters a valid name (less than 50 characters)
Step 3: User enters an invalid phone number (less than 10 digits)
Step 4: User clicks the update profile button
expected_result: The system displays an error message

title: Update Profile with Empty Name
steps: Step 1: User navigates to the profile management page
Step 2: User leaves the name field empty
Step 3: User enters a valid phone number (10 digits)
Step 4: User clicks the update profile button
expected_result: The system does not update the profile and displays an error message

title: Update Profile with Non-Numeric Phone Number
steps: Step 1: User navigates to the profile management page
Step 2: User enters a valid name (less than 50 characters)
Step 3: User enters a phone number with non-numeric characters
Step 4: User clicks the update profile button
expected_result: The system prevents the user from entering non-numeric characters and displays an error message

title: Update Profile with Name Exceeding 50 Characters
steps: Step 1: User navigates to the profile management page
Step 2: User enters a name exceeding 50 characters
Step 3: User enters a valid phone number (10 digits)
Step 4: User clicks the update profile button
expected_result: The system handles the case and displays an error message or truncates the name

title: 5 Consecutive Failed Login Attempts Lockout
preconditions: User is attempting to log in within a 1-hour time frame
steps: Step 1: Attempt to log in with an incorrect password 5 times consecutively
Step 2: Verify the account is locked after the 5th attempt
expected_result: The system locks the user's account and sends a notification

title: Invalid Password Reset Mechanism
preconditions: User is attempting to unlock their account
steps: Step 1: Attempt to unlock the account using an invalid password reset mechanism
Step 2: Verify the account remains locked
expected_result: The system does not unlock the account and displays an error message

title: Account Unlock After 15 Minutes of Inactivity
steps: Step 1: Wait for 15 minutes after the account was locked
Step 2: Attempt to log in with the correct password
expected_result: The system unlocks the account and allows the user to log in

title: Multiple Concurrent Login Sessions
preconditions: User has multiple concurrent login sessions
User attempts to log in from multiple locations
steps: Step 1: Attempt to log in from multiple locations concurrently
Step 2: Verify the system handles the multiple sessions correctly
expected_result: The system handles the multiple sessions correctly and locks the account after 5 consecutive failed login attempts

title: Less Than 5 Consecutive Failed Login Attempts
preconditions: User is attempting to log in within a 1-hour time frame
steps: Step 1: Attempt to log in with an incorrect password 4 times consecutively
Step 2: Verify the account is not locked
expected_result: The system does not lock the account

title: Secure Password Encryption
steps: Step 1: Create a new user account
Step 2: Set a password for the new account
Step 3: Verify the password is encrypted using a secure encryption algorithm
expected_result: The password is encrypted and stored securely

title: Invalid Input Validation
preconditions: User attempts to input malicious data
steps: Step 1: Attempt to input malicious data (e.g. SQL injection, XSS) into a form field
Step 2: Submit the form
Step 3: Verify the system prevents the malicious input from being processed
expected_result: The system prevents the malicious input from being processed and logs the event

title: Empty Input Validation
preconditions: User attempts to input empty data
steps: Step 1: Attempt to input empty data into a form field
Step 2: Submit the form
Step 3: Verify the system handles the empty input correctly
expected_result: The system handles the empty input correctly and does not crash or expose sensitive data

title: API Response Sensitive Data Exposure
steps: Step 1: Make an API request to retrieve sensitive data
Step 2: Verify the API response
Step 3: Check for exposure of sensitive data in the API response
expected_result: The API response does not expose sensitive data

title: Authentication Mechanism Bypass
steps: Step 1: Attempt to bypass the authentication mechanism (e.g. using a fake token)
Step 2: Verify the system prevents the bypass attempt
Step 3: Check for logging of the security-related event
expected_result: The system prevents the bypass attempt and logs the event

title: Valid API Request Response Time
steps: Step 1: Send a valid API request to the system
Step 2: Measure the response time of the system
expected_result: The system responds correctly to the API request within 2 seconds

title: Invalid API Request Error Handling
steps: Step 1: Send an API request with invalid data to the system
Step 2: Verify the system's error message response
expected_result: The system returns an error message within 2 seconds

title: High Load Response Time
preconditions: System under a load of 100 concurrent users
steps: Step 1: Simulate 100 concurrent API requests to the system
Step 2: Measure the response time of the system
expected_result: The system maintains a response time of 2 seconds

title: Timeout Error Handling
preconditions: System under a load that exceeds its capacity
steps: Step 1: Simulate a load that exceeds the system's capacity
Step 2: Verify the system's error message response
expected_result: The system returns an error message when it cannot respond within 2 seconds

title: Boundary Load Response Time
preconditions: System under a load of 99 concurrent users
System under a load of 101 concurrent users
steps: Step 1: Simulate 99 concurrent API requests to the system
Step 2: Measure the response time of the system
Step 3: Simulate 101 concurrent API requests to the system
Step 4: Measure the response time of the system
expected_result: The system maintains a response time of 2 seconds at both loads

title: System Supports 10,000 Concurrent Users
steps: Step 1: Simulate 10,000 concurrent user connections
Step 2: Monitor system performance and user connectivity
expected_result: System supports 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation

title: System Fails with Excessive Concurrent Users
steps: Step 1: Simulate 20,000 concurrent user connections
Step 2: Monitor system performance and user connectivity
expected_result: System fails to support 20,000 concurrent users and returns an error message

title: System Handles 20% Increase in Traffic
preconditions: Initial traffic is at 80% of system capacity
steps: Step 1: Simulate a 20% increase in traffic
Step 2: Monitor system performance and response time
expected_result: System handles the 20% increase in traffic without significant performance degradation

title: System Recovers Within 5 Minutes After Failure
steps: Step 1: Simulate a system failure
Step 2: Monitor system recovery time and performance
expected_result: System recovers within 5 minutes after failure and resumes normal operation

title: System Responds Within 2 Seconds for 95% of Requests
steps: Step 1: Simulate 10,000 concurrent user requests
Step 2: Monitor system response time for each request
expected_result: System responds within 2 seconds for at least 95% of requests

title: System Maintains Throughput of 500 Requests Per Second
steps: Step 1: Simulate a high volume of user requests
Step 2: Monitor system throughput and performance
expected_result: System maintains a throughput of at least 500 requests per second

title: System Uptime Availability
steps: Step 1: Monitor system uptime over a period of time
Step 2: Calculate the system uptime percentage
Step 3: Verify the system uptime percentage is greater than or equal to 99%
expected_result: System uptime percentage is greater than or equal to 99%

title: System Unavailability Error Message
preconditions: System is unavailable due to maintenance or failure
steps: Step 1: Attempt to access the system while it is unavailable
Step 2: Verify the system displays a clear error message
Step 3: Confirm the error message provides useful information about the system's status
expected_result: A clear error message is displayed with useful information about the system's status

title: Concurrent User Limit Edge Case
steps: Step 1: Simulate 100 concurrent users accessing the system
Step 2: Monitor system performance and response times
Step 3: Verify the system handles the concurrent users without significant performance degradation
expected_result: System handles 100 concurrent users without significant performance degradation

title: System Recovery from Failure
preconditions: System has failed and is in the process of recovering
steps: Step 1: Simulate a system failure
Step 2: Monitor system recovery time
Step 3: Verify the system recovers from the failure within 1 hour
expected_result: System recovers from the failure within 1 hour

title: Planned Maintenance Edge Case
preconditions: System is scheduled for planned maintenance
steps: Step 1: Schedule planned maintenance for the system
Step 2: Verify the system is unavailable during the maintenance window
Step 3: Confirm the system is available and functional after the maintenance window
expected_result: System is unavailable during the maintenance window and available after
